response.overview: Embark on a cinematic experience where art, music, and environmental advocacy seamlessly converge in this documentary film that follows the 70-ton sailing ship Arka Kinari on a global mission to raise awareness about the climate crisis.  Led by musicians Filastine & Nova, the ship transforms into a floating cultural stage connecting distant shores through the unifying language of music and art. The diverse crew of artists, musicians, and environmentalists onboard hosts performances and workshops igniting discussions about our planet’s future.  Combining adventure with activism, The Voyage of Arka Kinari highlights how creativity can drive impactful change.
response.title: The Voyage of Arka Kinari
